# Pizza Truck — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Pizza Truck is a mobile food truck business specializing in pizza. The brand has a street-food, on-the-go vibe with an approachable and casual personality, bringing fresh and delicious pizza directly to customers wherever they are.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Pizza Truck
Pizza Truck is a mobile food truck business specializing in pizza. The brand has a street-food, on-the-go vibe with an approachable and casual personality, bringing fresh and delicious pizza directly to customers wherever they are.

## Target Audience
- Urban Foodies
- Lunch Break Professionals
- Festival Goers

## Industry
food & beverage
